summary: Yeon-Ha engages in a conversation with her uncle about a past request, which quickly shifts to the dark history of the "Wango Shelter Massacre Incident" and the suspected involvement of the Daehyun Group. Her uncle warns her against digging deeper into the case, especially concerning Kim Ha-Jin's potential connection to it, fearing repercussions from a dangerous figure named Chase Joo-Chul. Their discussion is abruptly interrupted by a Golem attack, which Yeon-Ha skillfully handles with the timely advice of a comrade named Ezra. The chapter concludes with an evaluation of Chae Na-Yoon's exceptional magical power and her potential as a swordsman, hinting at upcoming guild activities.
key_moments: Yeon-Ha's uncle reveals details about the Wango Shelter Massacre, linking it to the Daehyun Group and warning against investigating Kim Ha-Jin's potential ties to it.
A Golem attack interrupts the conversation, leading Yeon-Ha to combat an unusually agile Golem, which she eventually defeats with Ezra's assistance.
A discussion ensues about Chae Na-Yoon's exceptional magical power and suitability to become a powerful swordswoman.
